title: Mascagnia platyrachis
taxonomy: Mascagnia platyrachis is classified as a species within the family Malpighiaceae. This family consists of plants commonly known as barbados shrubs or malpighia. The Malpighiaceae family is further grouped within the order Malpighiales. The Malpighiales order is a part of the larger clade of Rosids. Within the Rosids clade, Mascagnia platyrachis is also classified as a part of the larger group of flowering plants called angiosperms.
